description:
Goal
Close the arc by deleting obsolete names/paths/docs and documenting the final ownership-boundary invariant.

Why
This work is only complete if the codebase no longer contains the old model as a parallel vocabulary. Keeping tail-only names, old-world pins, or temporary fixture sidecars will mislead the next agent and invite patchy fixes.

Cleanup scope
- Delete or rewrite docs that describe reusable cons as "owned cons reuse" if that phrase now implies the wrong tail-only model.
- Update agent-facing docs in `.agent/docs/*` that explain compiler2 pipeline, native lowering, telemetry, scheduler/closure behavior, and ownership boundaries.
- Update user-facing guides only when they describe fixture contracts, compiler2 telemetry, or native allocation behavior.
- Remove obsolete tests that pin implementation strings such as old `owned_cons_reuse`, `tuple_fields_list_tail`, or old-world dump names, replacing them with intent-level assertions around the new capability.
- Remove temporary fixture sidecars or engine-specific differences that no longer express a real semantic/runtime distinction.
- Ensure `rg "OwnedConsReuse|record_owned_cons_reuse|owned_cons_reuse|reuse_or_cons_tail|fz_list_reuse_or_cons_tail_ref"` returns no production-code hits except historical docs explicitly marked as old-world reference, if any.

Validation
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --workspace` unless an open ticket documents unrelated timeout-sensitive fixture legs; if so, run the maximal focused set and cite the blocking ticket.
- `bw ready` should show no hidden cleanup ticket created by this arc unless there is a deliberate follow-up with a clear reason.

Acceptance
The final code/docs expose one model: reusable cons cells are physical capabilities, born from list splitting, transported through hidden physical params, consumed by generalized list construction, and erased from semantics. No shim, adapter, or old tail-only path remains.
title: Closeout: delete obsolete owned-cons/tail-only debt and document the invariant
